Name: kan_depth_sweep
Title: Depth vs Neural Collapse in KAN-Inspired Probes
Experiment: Add a configurable hidden depth in experiment.py and sweep 1-3 KAN layers. Track how nc_ratio and accuracy trade off across depths.

Name: orthonormal_last_layer
Title: Orthonormal Last-Layer Constraints for Faster Collapse
Experiment: Project classifier weights to the Stiefel manifold each step and compare nc_ratio against the baseline probe.
